case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ASHLEY MILBURN ET AL

docket_entries.description: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200007135) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILBURN, ASHLEY $3,026.61 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,267.61, SEE SCANNED DOC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200007135) AS TO DEFENDANT MILBURN, ASHLEY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100049030), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED AUG-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILBURN, ASHLEY

DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 200007135) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILBURN, ASHLEY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2019
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200007135) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
